tweets.text: On January 29, President @realDonaldTrump signed the #USMCA, the largest, fairest, most balanced, and modern trade agreement ever achieved. It opens a new chapter in trade relations with #Mexico and #Canada. Learn more here: https://t.co/UXLjus5vMx https://t.co/wwoJKrpTNf

This week, President @realDonaldTrump unveiled his comprehensive vision for peace between #Israel and the Palestinians. This vision is fundamentally different from past proposals. Learn more here: https://t.co/jFaCvqMSjG

Special Representative Hook: In coordination with @USTreasury, we are pleased to announce that we have completed the sale and delivery of cancer drugs and transplant drugs to #Iran. This channel applies strict due diligence measures to avoid misuse by the Iranian regime. https://t.co/lfVQxqTQVA

Special Representative Brian Hook: We are sanctioning the Atomic Energy Organization of #Iran and its chief officer, Ali-Akbar Salehi. President @realDonaldTrump is committed to denying Iran from ever acquiring a nuclear weapon. https://t.co/rPePt9bInX

5G will change the world and power the future, but as the world builds out its #5G networks, we must choose carefully to keep ourselves safe. Securing 5G networks is vital to protect privacy, to safeguard human rights, and to ensure national security. https://t.co/bOVyeaXROp

.@SecPompeo: Fewer dollars in the hands of the ayatollah are a good thing, and we're urging the world to join us. This will give the Iranian people the opportunity they need to change the behavior of the Islamic Republic of #Iran. https://t.co/1APxtCxYjo https://t.co/gE5TEyOBQK

President @realDonaldTrump: Those who are filled with hate must never succeed in their efforts to minimize, deny, or erase the Holocaust from our memories or our history books. https://t.co/ebhgqneojn #WeRemember #NeverAgain https://t.co/DuURTVLhyY

Today #WeRemember the 75th anniversary of the liberation of Auschwitz and mourn those murdered within its fences. America will not rest in combating Holocaust denial; anti-Semitism; and all forms of hatred, racism, and discrimination. #NeverAgain https://t.co/CsMHLj0cZe

President @realDonaldTrump: On the 75th anniversary of the liberation of Auschwitz, #WeRemember the 6 million Jews who perished in the Holocaust and recommit ourselves to the fight against anti-Semitism. https://t.co/1WtEkShDix #NeverAgain https://t.co/BpAUHx6IG0
Our thoughts are with our friends and Allies in #Turkey following the terrible earthquake, and we share our deep condolences with all who lost loved ones to this tragedy.

We commend #Bulgaria’s recent actions to defend its independence and sovereignty from malign influence and its decision to expel Russian agents accused of espionage. We will support our #NATO Ally and EU Partner as it exercises its rights to define its future.
A very happy Lunar New Year to all those celebrating! May the Year of the Rat bring peace, joy, and prosperity to all. https://t.co/J6srEgg2bq

#ThisWeekatState, @SecPompeo traveled to Colombia, Costa Rica, Jamaica & Florida to promote a hemisphere of freedom and the U.S. ideals of democracy, liberty, #religiousfreedom & prosperity. Ambassador Jeffrey reiterated the Global @Coalition's commitment to defeating ISIS. https://t.co/bQuXQFFN44
